questionHtml: Show that the internal resistance of the cell is about 0.7 Ω.
markschemeHtml:
29.4 (50.0 + r) = 139 (10.0 + r) ✓


attempt to solve for r, e.g. 29.4 × 50.0 − 139 × 10.0 = r (139 − 29.4)

OR

0.73 «Ω» ✓

 

Do not allow working backwards from 0.7 Ω.

meta.title: Show that the internal resistance of the cell is about 0.7 Ω.
